Off Calendar Jul-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS THOMPSON BUILDERS CORP, AND SURETEC INSURANCE COPMANY's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Its First Amended Cross-Complaint Against Chinese American International School.

The unopposed motion by Thompson Builders Corporation for leave to file a first amended cross-complaint against Chinese American International School is granted. Thompson shall file within 10 days of entry of this order.

Order signed.
